---
title: "Yanping Weng"
image: misc/info/photo.png
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: mailbox
      text: yanping.weng@outlook.com
      href: mailto:yanping.weng@outlook.com
    - icon: github
      text: yan-ww
      href: https://github.com/yan-ww
    - icon: linkedin
      text: Yanping Weng
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/wengyanping/
---

::: {#hero-heading}

Hello, and welcome!  

I am Yanping Weng, with a Master’s degree in Bioinformatics from Fudan University.

My research focuses on computational genomics, single-cell and multi-omics analysis, and machine learning for disease subtype and biomarker discovery.  

I am currently seeking PhD opportunities in computational biology and cancer genomics.

:::
